name: dexe-mcp
description: DeXe Protocol governance for Claude Code — one plugin to deploy DAOs, draft and vote on proposals, run OTC sales, and read on-chain state.

plugins.name: dexe
plugins.description: DeXe Protocol DAO governance for Claude — deploy DAOs, draft/vote/execute proposals, OTC sales, IPFS metadata. Reads work with zero setup; add keys only for writes.
